Bash(__NEW_LINE_ef5883ef4b3b5e4e__ poetry run jackknife memory store "Exception hierarchy: all exceptions inherit from JackknifeError. Bash(__NEW_LINE_ef5883ef4b3b5e4e__ poetry run jackknife memory store "Config via pydantic-settings. Each blade has its own *Settings class. Top-level Settings composes all blades. get_settings\(\) is @lru_cache — call get_settings.cache_clear\(\) in tests. All path fields must be absolute." --type architecture --tag config --tag settings)

Bash(__NEW_LINE_ef5883ef4b3b5e4e__ poetry run jackknife memory store "Memory write queue: MemoryWriteQueue serializes concurrent writes to ChromaDB via asyncio.Queue. Bash(__NEW_LINE_ef5883ef4b3b5e4e__ poetry run jackknife memory store "CI/CD: ruff \(lint+format\), mypy strict, pytest with 80% coverage required. Pre-commit runs all three locally. Bash(__NEW_LINE_ef5883ef4b3b5e4e__ poetry run jackknife memory store "Commit message format \(commitizen enforced\): feat:, fix:, docs:, refactor:, test:, chore:, ci:. Never commit to main directly. Always branch → commit → PR." --type convention --tag git --tag workflow)

Bash(__NEW_LINE_ef5883ef4b3b5e4e__ poetry run jackknife memory store "Task graph orchestration: NetworkX DiGraph where edges A→B mean ''B depends on A''. ready_tasks\(\) returns PENDING tasks with all deps COMPLETED.
